mapper.sql: SELECT NOTICE_NO , NOTICE_TITLE , U.USER_NAME , N.CREATE_DATE , N.PUBLIC_YN , VIEWS
mapper.select: FROM NOTICE N JOIN SEMI_USER U ON N.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE N.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY N.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
, N.STATUS FROM NOTICE N JOIN SEMI_USER U ON N.USER_ID = U.USER_ID ORDER BY N.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
, NOTICE_CONTENT FROM NOTICE N JOIN SEMI_USER U ON N.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
, NOTICE_CONTENT , N.STATUS FROM NOTICE N JOIN SEMI_USER U ON N.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
, NOTICE_CONTENT FROM NOTICE N JOIN SEMI_USER U ON N.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE PUBLIC_YN = 'Y' AND N.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY NOTICE_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
UPDATE NOTICE SET STATUS = 'Y' WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET VIEWS = VIEWS +1 WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
